# Archivist Documentation

> Technical documentation for Archivist, the decentralized durability engine. Guides for building, running, and using Archivist nodes.

## Getting Started
- [What is Archivist?](https://docs.archivist.storage/learn/what-is-archivist): Overview and core concepts
- [Architecture](https://docs.archivist.storage/learn/architecture): System architecture
- [Quick Start](https://docs.archivist.storage/learn/quick-start): Get running fast
- [Build Archivist](https://docs.archivist.storage/learn/build): Building from source
- [Run Archivist](https://docs.archivist.storage/learn/run): Running a node

## Reference
- [API](https://docs.archivist.storage/developers/api): REST API reference
- [Whitepaper](https://docs.archivist.storage/learn/whitepaper): Technical whitepaper
- [Tokenomics Litepaper](https://docs.archivist.storage/learn/tokenomics-litepaper): Token economics

## Networks
- [Devnet](https://docs.archivist.storage/networks/devnet): Development network
- [Testnet](https://docs.archivist.storage/networks/testnet): Test network

## Related
- [Main Site](https://archivist.storage): Product overview
- [Blog](https://blog.archivist.storage): Technical insights and research
